/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN FOR 06-11-22 FAILURE TO APPEAR AND RETURN ON SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT FOR NON COMPLIANCE/BWDNC/SAWD/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/IBARRA/
